name: testWaitForDiagSetIdentifiedVariant
title: testWaitForDiagSetIdentifiedVariant
description: Performs a variant identification and activates the found variant.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU or target as set in the diagnostic configuration dialog for the respective diagnostic description.

return: <=0: An error occurred, e.g. a wrong variant Qualifier was used or a communication error occurred.
